# Code Anchors: Markdown Editor

- `libs/editor/src/markdown-editor.tsx` — the component: Markdown edit/view modes and the raw-edit plain-text submit mode, its Enter-gesture handling, and verbatim text extraction.
- `libs/editor/src/editor-theme.ts` — theme-token wiring for the Lexical instance.
- `libs/editor/src/table-action-menu-plugin.tsx` — the Markdown mode's table action menu plugin (not mounted in raw-edit).
- `libs/editor/src/index.ts` — the library's export surface.
- `libs/editor/src/markdown-editor.spec.tsx` — mode behavior verification, including the raw-edit Enter/Shift+Enter/empty-submit contract.
- `libs/editor/test-setup.ts` — jsdom layout shim used to drive the Lexical model in tests.
